---
title: "HARMAN International Consulting (NDA)"
image: images/harman_consulting.jpeg
---

**Business Consultant**

My team of 5 was assigned the task of investigating the feasibility, benefits, and risks of implementing a new financial strategy, aiding in B2B and B2C market expansion. We researched business case studies, market trends, competitors, and platform options. Our deliverables include seamless end-to-end prototypes to model user flows and mockups of techniques to track financial and operational KPIs.

After 8 weeks, we presented our pitch deck, recommendations, and prototypes to HARMAN staff. We were awarded the winners of this “PitchFest.” A week later, I was chosen to present my team’s work again to HARMAN executives. We were praised for exploring the depths of our assigned problem statement.
